panels.description: % Patients with RBS <140, FBS <126 mg/dL, or HbA1c <7%

defaults.displayName: % Patients with RBS <140, FBS <126 mg/dL, or HbA1c <7%

matcher.options: % Patients with RBS <140, FBS <126 mg/dL, or HbA1c <7%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  ref_month AS "time",
  SUM(100.0 * diabetes_controlled) /
  (0.00000001 + SUM(diabetes_patients_under_care)) AS blood_sugar_control_rate
FROM HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_CONTROLLED
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
GROUP BY ref_month
ORDER BY ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.title: Controlled Blood Sugar

panels.description: % Patients with uncontrolled blood sugar (moderate and high)

matcher.options: % Patients with RBS 140–199, FBS 126–199 mg/dL, or HbA1c 7–8.9%
% Patients with RBS ≥200, FBS ≥200 mg/dL, or HbA1c ≥9%
% Patients with RBS 140–199, FBS 126–199 mg/dL, or HbA1c 7

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH months AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp),
    date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp),
    '1 month'::interval
  )::date AS ref_month
)
SELECT
  months.ref_month AS "time",

  COALESCE(SUM(100.0 * s.uncontrolled_moderate) / NULLIF(SUM(s.diabetes_patients_under_care), 0), 0)
  AS "% Patients with RBS 140–199, FBS 126–199 mg/dL, or HbA1c 7–8.9%",

  COALESCE(SUM(100.0 * s.uncontrolled_high) / NULLIF(SUM(s.diabetes_patients_under_care), 0), 0)
  AS "% Patients with RBS ≥200, FBS ≥200 mg/dL, or HbA1c ≥9%",

  COALESCE(SUM(100.0 * (s.uncontrolled_moderate + s.uncontrolled_high)) / NULLIF(SUM(s.diabetes_patients_under_care), 0), 0)
  AS "% Total Uncontrolled"

FROM months
LEFT JOIN HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_SEVERITY s
  ON s.ref_month = months.ref_month
  AND s.org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
GROUP BY months.ref_month
ORDER BY months.ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.title: Uncontrolled Blood Sugar

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
    ref_month AS "time",
    SUM(100.0 * missed_visit) /
    (0.00000001 + SUM(diabetes_patients_under_care)) AS missed_visit_rate
FROM HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_MISSED_VISITS
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
GROUP BY ref_month
ORDER BY ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  (SUM(diabetes_controlled) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(diabetes_patients_under_care), 0)) AS value
FROM HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_CONTROLLED
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
  AND ref_month = (
    SELECT MAX(ref_month) FROM HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_CONTROLLED
    WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
  )
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.description: Patients under care for diabetes with controlled BP at their latest visit in the past 3 months

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  ref_month AS "time",
  SUM(100.0 * bp_controlled_140_90) /
  (0.00000001 + SUM(dm_patients_under_care)) AS "Patients with BP <140/90",
  SUM(100.0 * bp_controlled_130_80) /
  (0.00000001 + SUM(dm_patients_under_care)) AS "Patients with BP <130/80"
FROM HEART360_DM_BP_CONTROL
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
GROUP BY ref_month
ORDER BY ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.description: Patients with diabetes with no visit in the past 12 months

defaults.displayName: % DM patients with no visit in the past 12 months

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  ref_month,
  (100.0 * SUM(COALESCE(nb_patients_lost_to_follow_up, 0))) /
  NULLIF(SUM(TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_PATIENTS), 0) AS lost_to_follow_up_pct
FROM HEART360_DM_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
GROUP BY ref_month
ORDER BY ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.title: 12 month lost to follow-up

panels.description: Patients with diabetes with at least 1 visit in the past 12 months

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH selected_org AS (
  SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1)))
),
known_months AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', series_date)::date AS ref_month
  FROM generate_series(
    DATE_TRUNC('month', (SELECT MIN(registration_date) FROM patients)),
    DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE),
    '1 month'::interval
  ) AS t(series_date)
),
monthly_registrations AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', p.registration_date)::date AS ref_month,
    COUNT(*) AS nb_new_dm_patients
  FROM patients p
  WHERE LOWER(p.patient_status) <> 'dead'
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM patient_diagnoses pd WHERE pd.patient_id = p.patient_id AND pd.diagnosis_code = 'E11')
    AND p.org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM selected_org)
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', p.registration_date)
),
dm_under_care AS (
  SELECT
    uc.ref_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(uc.nb_patients_controlled, 0) + COALESCE(uc.nb_patients_uncontrolled, 0) + COALESCE(uc.nb_patients_no_visit, 0)) AS nb_dm_patients_under_care
  FROM HEART360_DM_PATIENTS_CATAGORY uc
  WHERE uc.org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM selected_org)
  GROUP BY uc.ref_month
)
SELECT
  km.ref_month,
  SUM(COALESCE(mr.nb_new_dm_patients, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY km.ref_month) AS cumulative_dm_patients,
  c.nb_dm_patients_under_care,
  COALESCE(mr.nb_new_dm_patients, 0) AS nb_new_dm_patients
FROM known_months km
LEFT JOIN monthly_registrations mr ON mr.ref_month = km.ref_month
LEFT JOIN dm_under_care c ON c.ref_month = km.ref_month
ORDER BY km.ref_month
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

panels.title: Patients under care

options.content: Treatment outcomes for patients with diabetes at their latest visit before <u>**${reference_month:date:MMMM YYYY}**</u>

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH latest_month AS (
    SELECT MAX(ref_month) AS ref_month FROM HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_CONTROLLED
    WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
    AND $__timeFilter(ref_month)
)
SELECT
    child_ou.id AS child_id,
    child_ou.name AS child_name,
    REPLACE(build_drill_url(child_ou.id), '/d/heart360_drilldown?', '/d/heart360_drilldown_diabetes?') AS drill_url,
    SUM(COALESCE(uc.nb_dm_patients_under_care, 0)) AS nb_patients_under_care,
    SUM(COALESCE(uc.nb_new_dm_patients, 0)) AS nb_patients_newly_registered,
    SUM(COALESCE(bsc.diabetes_controlled, 0)) AS nb_patients_controlled,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(COALESCE(bsc.diabetes_controlled, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(bsc.diabetes_patients_under_care, 0)), 0)) AS per_patients_controlled,
    SUM(COALESCE(bss.uncontrolled_moderate, 0) + COALESCE(bss.uncontrolled_high, 0)) AS nb_patients_uncontrolled,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(COALESCE(bss.uncontrolled_moderate, 0) + COALESCE(bss.uncontrolled_high, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(bss.diabetes_patients_under_care, 0)), 0)) AS per_patients_uncontrolled,
    SUM(COALESCE(bsm.missed_visit, 0)) AS nb_patients_no_visit,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(COALESCE(bsm.missed_visit, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(bsm.diabetes_patients_under_care, 0)), 0)) AS per_patients_no_visit
FROM org_unit_lineage lin
JOIN org_units child_ou ON lin.ancestor_id = child_ou.id AND child_ou.parent_id = ((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))
LEFT JOIN HEART360_DM_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE uc ON uc.org_unit_id = lin.org_unit_id AND uc.ref_month = (SELECT ref_month FROM latest_month)
LEFT JOIN HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_CONTROLLED bsc ON bsc.org_unit_id = lin.org_unit_id AND bsc.ref_month = (SELECT ref_month FROM latest_month)
LEFT JOIN HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_SEVERITY bss ON bss.org_unit_id = lin.org_unit_id AND bss.ref_month = (SELECT ref_month FROM latest_month)
LEFT JOIN HEART360_BLOOD_SUGAR_MISSED_VISITS bsm ON bsm.org_unit_id = lin.org_unit_id AND bsm.ref_month = (SELECT ref_month FROM latest_month)
GROUP BY child_ou.id, child_ou.name
ORDER BY child_ou.name
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

list.definition: SELECT CASE WHEN is_admin = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __value FROM grafana_schema.user WHERE id = ${__user.id} LIMIT 1
list.name: isAdmin

query.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_admin = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __value FROM grafana_schema.user WHERE id = ${__user.id} LIMIT 1

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(1), 0) AS is_allowed
FROM grafana_schema.user u
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND (
      u.is_admin = true
      OR t.name IN (
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'aggregated') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
          
          UNION
          
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'patients') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
      )
      OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM heart360tk_schema.hierarchy_config hc
          WHERE t.name IN (
              'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_aggregated_ALL',
              'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_patients_ALL'
          )
            AND hc.level <= (SELECT level FROM heart360tk_schema.org_units WHERE id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int LIMIT 1)
      )
  )
list.name: isAllowed

query.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(1), 0) AS is_allowed
FROM grafana_schema.user u
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND (
      u.is_admin = true
      OR t.name IN (
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'aggregated') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
          
          UNION
          
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'patients') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
      )
      OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM heart360tk_schema.hierarchy_config hc
          WHERE t.name IN (
              'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_aggregated_ALL',
              'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_patients_ALL'
          )
            AND hc.level <= (SELECT level FROM heart360tk_schema.org_units WHERE id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int LIMIT 1)
      )
  )

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE( '' || (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int, 'patients') LIMIT 1) || ', ' || '' || (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int, 'aggregated') LIMIT 1) || ', or an ' || '_ALL access team', 'None' ) AS required_groups
